// ⚠️ API CONFIGURATION REQUIRED: Update connection strings and secrets for your environment

ApplicationInsights.// ConnectionString_Note: ⚠️ Set via APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING environment variable in Azure

ConnectionStrings.// CosmosDb_Note: ⚠️ SECURITY: NEVER commit secrets to version control! Use Azure Key Vault (recommended) or User Secrets for local development. See docs/setup/SECRETS_MANAGEMENT.md
ConnectionStrings.// PostgreSQL_Note: ⚠️ SECURITY: PostgreSQL connection string for hybrid data strategy (Phase 2+). Use Azure Key Vault or User Secrets.
ConnectionStrings.// Redis_Note: ⚠️ SECURITY: Redis connection string for content caching. Use Azure Key Vault or User Secrets.
ConnectionStrings.// AzureStorage_Note: ⚠️ SECURITY: NEVER commit secrets to version control! Use Azure Key Vault (recommended) or User Secrets for local development.

DataMigration.// Enabled_Note: Set to true to enable migration features
DataMigration.// ReadOnlyPostgresAccess_Note: Admin API always has read-only PostgreSQL access for user data

Jwt.// Key_Note: ⚠️ UPDATE: Add your JWT signing key (keep secret!)
Jwt.// Issuer_Note: ⚠️ UPDATE: Change to your API issuer name
Jwt.// Audience_Note: ⚠️ UPDATE: Change to your app audience name

AzureAd.// Instance_Note: Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) instance URL
AzureAd.// TenantId_Note: ⚠️ UPDATE: Your Azure AD tenant ID (GUID)
AzureAd.// ClientId_Note: ⚠️ UPDATE: App registration client ID for mystira-admin-api
AzureAd.// Audience_Note: Application ID URI from app registration
AzureAd.// Scopes_Note: API scopes exposed by this application

Authorization.// Roles_Note: App roles defined in Entra ID app registration

AdminAuth.// Username_Note: ⚠️ SECURITY: Admin username for cookie auth. Use Azure Key Vault or User Secrets.
AdminAuth.// PasswordHash_Note: ⚠️ SECURITY: SHA256 hash of admin password. Generate with: echo -n 'your-password' | sha256sum | awk '{print $1}'

BlobStorage.// ContainerName_Note: ⚠️ UPDATE: Change to your blob container name

CosmosDb.// DatabaseName_Note: ⚠️ UPDATE: Change to your Cosmos DB database name

AzureCommunicationServices.// ConnectionString_Note: ⚠️ UPDATE: Add your Azure Communication Services connection string
AzureCommunicationServices.// SenderEmail_Note: ⚠️ UPDATE: Add your verified ACS sender email address (e.g., DoNotReply@mystira.azurecomm.net)

StoryProtocol.// RpcUrl_Note: ⚠️ UPDATE: Add Story Protocol RPC endpoint URL when using real blockchain
StoryProtocol.// Contracts_Note: ⚠️ UPDATE: Add Story Protocol smart contract addresses for production

// App_Note: ⚠️ App status configuration moved to appstatus.json
// InitializeDatabaseOnStartup_Note: ⚠️ Set to true to initialize database on startup (default: false for production). Database containers should be pre-created in Azure Cosmos DB. Use true for local development with in-memory database.
// SeedMasterDataOnStartup_Note: ⚠️ Set to true to seed master data on startup (default: false). Only enable if database is accessible and initialized. Automatically enabled for in-memory databases.
